description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in a long coat, waistcoat, and trousers, with a full beard and mustache. The figure stands confidently with one hand resting on a sculpted pedestal or tree stump, while the other hand is placed on his hip. The base is rectangular and solid, supporting both the figure and the adjacent pedestal. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, greenish patina, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal exposed to the elements. The details in the clothing, facial features, and posture convey a sense of dignity and historical significance. The overall form is lifelike and proportionate, with careful attention to anatomical and textural details.
description: A weathered bronze sculpture of a bearded man in a long coat, standing with one hand on a pedestal and the other on his hip. The figure is lifelike, detailed, and exudes historical gravitas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, detailed coat, and his right hand resting on a pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm on the hip, and the side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat, legs, and the full width of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the back of the head, the arm on the hip, and the side of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
